The '''Class-F cargo container''' was a slotted box-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as the [[Freighter Type C]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Usually, the Class-F container carried goods produced by a factory.<ref name="XWA" />
